name: team-chat
description: Local Team Chat bridge. Lets agents broadcast/send messages into the local Team Chat sessions, and publish local files as clickable links.

tools.name: team_chat_send
tools.description: Send a message into the local Team Chat as a specific agent session. Invoke when you need to message the user/team in the local group chat.

broadcast.description: If true, treat as broadcast to all agents (overrides 'to').

tools.name: team_chat_share_file
tools.description: Publish a local file to the Team Chat uploads folder and return a clickable local URL. Invoke when you want to send the user a file/image link.

tools.name: team_chat_get_tunnel
tools.description: Get the latest TeamChat tunnel URL for remote access. Use this when you need to share the access link with the user.
